case_title: MARCHANT, P.R. VS DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARCHANT, P.R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST DURR, ANNA  C/O PARK HYATT $615.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,095.00 FILED BY DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST DURR, ANNA  C/O PARK HYATT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MARCHANT, P.R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.00 FILED BY MARCHANT, P.R. AS TO DEFENDANT DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST DURR, ANNA  C/O PARK HYATT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST DURR, ANNA  C/O PARK HYATT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DURR, THOMAS C/O PHYSIO WEST DURR, ANNA  C/O PARK HYATT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MARCHANT, P.R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
